description: Self-contained Knowlex RAG evaluation set. The `corpus` section is seeded via /api/kb/ingest before each eval run; the `questions` section is run through /api/kb/ask and scored against `expectedSubstrings` (answer-faithfulness proxy) and `expectedDocumentTitle` (citation proxy).

corpus.title: Knowlex RAG architecture
corpus.content: Knowlex is a retrieval-augmented generation app in the craftstack monorepo. Documents pasted into the /kb page are split into paragraph-aware 512-character chunks, embedded with the gemini-embedding-001 model at 768 dimensions via the outputDimensionality provider option, and stored in a pgvector column on Neon Postgres. Retrieval uses cosine distance (the <=> operator) over an HNSW index, returning the top-K nearest chunks for the query, which are then cited by number in the streamed Gemini 2.0 Flash answer.

corpus.title: Boardly realtime architecture
corpus.content: Boardly is a realtime collaborative kanban app. Card positions use LexoRank strings for O(1) reordering — moving a card between two neighbours only writes one row. Every mutation broadcasts via Pusher Channels to all clients currently watching the board. Card updates use optimistic locking with a version column; stale writes return HTTP 409 VERSION_MISMATCH and the client replays after refreshing its local state.

corpus.title: Security posture
corpus.content: The craftstack monorepo scores an A grade on securityheaders.com. The Content Security Policy allowlists Vercel platform scripts with unsafe-inline because an earlier nonce-based CSP with strict-dynamic broke hydration on Vercel's runtime (platform-injected scripts did not carry the per-request nonce). Every other hardened header remains intact: HSTS with a two-year preload, X-Frame-Options DENY, Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy same-origin, and a Permissions-Policy denying seventeen unused sensor and media capabilities. See ADR-0040 for the full rollback rationale.
